objective: Close the remaining owner-system proof gaps for Blueprint-WebApp's $500/month autonomous-org launch/growth budget without live mutation.

codex_oauth_pro.proof_boundary: Pre-existing Codex OAuth/Pro subscription usage is not counted against the $500 launch/growth cash envelope and is not an OpenAI API/model-spend allowance.

openai_api_guardrail.proof_boundary: Read-only OpenAI Costs query verified $0.00 current-period API spend; keep target at $0 unless a human approves API usage.

remaining_items.closeout_gap: DeepSeek direct usage export and OpenRouter billing if used
remaining_items.owner_system: DeepSeek API account and OpenRouter account if used
remaining_items.currently_have: DeepSeek read-only balance proof exists as live-credit-balance; OpenRouter read-only credits returned 401 User not found with the stored key.
remaining_items.proof_needed: DeepSeek monthly usage or invoice export, plus valid OpenRouter credit/billing read or export if any DeepSeek runs route through OpenRouter.
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: DeepSeek usage/invoice export for the current month; valid OpenRouter API key or dashboard export only if OpenRouter is used.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not treat credit balance as monthly usage, and do not move model budget from OpenAI API or Codex OAuth/Pro without an approval artifact.

remaining_items.currently_have: Render read-only service inventory shows 5 web services; no billing amount is exposed by the current adapter.
remaining_items.proof_needed: Render billing endpoint proof, current invoice export, dashboard screenshot/export, or other owner-system billing artifact for the current period.
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: Render billing export/dashboard proof if the API cannot return current billing.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not infer billing spend from service count or deployment presence.

remaining_items.owner_system: DigitalOcean billing, Cloudflare account billing, and Paperclip host ledger
remaining_items.currently_have: DigitalOcean read-only billing/account query returned account balance metadata but no invoice preview amount; Cloudflare credentials are missing.
remaining_items.proof_needed: Current DigitalOcean invoice preview/export or dashboard proof, plus Cloudflare billing profile/export if the tunnel has billable spend.
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: Cloudflare account id/token if tunnel billing is relevant; DigitalOcean invoice export if API preview remains absent.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not bootstrap, reconcile, restart, or resize host/tunnel services to prove billing.

remaining_items.owner_system: Google Cloud Billing export for Firebase project blueprint-8c1ca
remaining_items.currently_have: Firebase project config is present; no Cloud Billing export is attached.
remaining_items.proof_needed: GCP/Firebase Cloud Billing export or BigQuery billing export JSON for the current period.
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: Local exported JSON report path in GCP_BILLING_EXPORT_JSON, or a future read-only BigQuery billing query adapter.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not treat Firebase web config, Firestore availability, or app usage as billing proof.

remaining_items.currently_have: No Upstash API key/email or billing export is available to the collector.
remaining_items.proof_needed: Upstash/Redis billing endpoint result, usage export, invoice, or dashboard proof.
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: UPSTASH_API_KEY and UPSTASH_EMAIL, or a current invoice/export artifact.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not infer spend from REDIS_URL presence or hosted-session code paths.

remaining_items.owner_system: SendGrid, Gmail human-reply path, and Slack workspace
remaining_items.currently_have: SendGrid read-only credits show daily credit state; Slack billing token is missing; Gmail/sender readiness is not proven by spend snapshot.
remaining_items.proof_needed: SendGrid plan/billing export, Slack admin billing/export if paid, and safe human-reply/sender readiness audit output.
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN if Slack billing/usage proof is needed; SendGrid billing export or dashboard proof; sender/domain verification state for live sends.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not send test mail, poll Gmail, or treat SendGrid credits as sender/domain verification.

remaining_items.closeout_gap: Analytics billing and KPI owner-system proof
remaining_items.owner_system: PostHog, GA4, or Firestore analytics mirror
remaining_items.currently_have: KPI source-status artifacts exist with source-needed rows; PostHog/GA4 billing and analytics export are missing.
remaining_items.proof_needed: Analytics export or owner-system KPI proof for allocation outcomes; billing proof if paid analytics is introduced.
remaining_items.safe_proof_command: npm run autonomy:outcomes:snapshot && npm run autonomy:budget:recommend
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: POSTHOG_PERSONAL_API_KEY/host/project id or a local GA4/PostHog/Firestore export when analytics is used for allocation.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not increase analytics budget from page prose, fixture KPI rows, or unsourced metrics.

remaining_items.owner_system: Search or research API provider account
remaining_items.currently_have: No search/research provider key is present in the snapshot.
remaining_items.proof_needed: Provider identity plus billing or usage export for Parallel, Perplexity, Tavily, SerpAPI, or whichever search provider is used.
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: One of PARALLEL_API_KEY, PARALLEL_SEARCH_API_KEY, PERPLEXITY_API_KEY, TAVILY_API_KEY, or SERPAPI_API_KEY, plus billing/export proof.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not treat web research volume or generated dossiers as provider billing proof.

remaining_items.closeout_gap: Recipient evidence enrichment receipts or provider exports
remaining_items.owner_system: GTM evidence/enrichment providers and recipient evidence artifacts
remaining_items.currently_have: Recipient enrichment line exists as budget target and credential-presence placeholder; outcome proof did not clear dynamic allocation thresholds.
remaining_items.proof_needed: Receipts, provider exports, or repo-local recipient evidence artifacts tied to exact-site hosted-review outcomes.
remaining_items.safe_proof_command: npm run autonomy:outcomes:snapshot && npm run autonomy:budget:recommend && npm run autonomy:budget:dynamic:verify
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: Human-supplied receipts/provider export path, or fresh recipient-backed GTM evidence artifacts.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not buy enrichment, send outreach, or claim recipient-backed traction from drafted target lists alone.

remaining_items.budget_line: Profiles, listings, and owned growth ops
remaining_items.currently_have: Owned growth/profile budget target exists; no receipts or provider exports are attached.
remaining_items.proof_needed: Receipt, invoice, provider export, or owner-system proof for any paid profile/listing spend.
remaining_items.safe_proof_command: npm run autonomy:spend:snapshot && npm run autonomy:budget:verify
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: Manual receipt/export path if any profile or listing spend occurs.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not treat organic profile work as spend, and do not publish paid listings without approval.

remaining_items.closeout_gap: Ad account spend and paused-draft proof
remaining_items.owner_system: Meta Ads and Google Ads accounts
remaining_items.currently_have: No Meta or Google Ads read credentials are present; ad outcome export is missing.
remaining_items.proof_needed: Read-only ad spend/export proof and paused-draft evidence before any paid city/launch experiment can be considered.
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: META_ACCESS_TOKEN and META_AD_ACCOUNT_ID, or Google Ads customer/developer/OAuth credentials, plus human approval before launch.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not create, edit, or launch ads; paused-draft proof and live spend require explicit approval.

remaining_items.closeout_gap: Live Paperclip routine execution after repo config propagation
remaining_items.currently_have: Repo-local .paperclip.yaml proves the declared package envelope and routine cadence; live Paperclip runtime propagation has not been verified.
remaining_items.proof_needed: Live Paperclip runtime inventory or issue/routine run proof showing the compressed routine set is propagated.
remaining_items.exact_input_needed: If live runtime propagation is required, run an explicit read-only Paperclip runtime proof task with approval for any live access; do not reconcile or mutate.
remaining_items.disallowed_workaround: Do not run Paperclip bootstrap, reconcile, repair, restart, or import commands to prove propagation.
